message:
test(completions): Add comprehensive unit tests for InstallPaths and InstallResult

Add extensive test coverage for shell completion installation infrastructure:

- Test InstallPaths Clone implementation with all fields populated
- Test InstallPaths Debug formatting with various configurations
- Test InstallPaths without rc_file/rc_line (edge case handling)
- Test InstallResult Debug formatting with all state combinations
- Test get_install_paths for PowerShell (.ps1 extension, profile setup)
- Test get_install_paths for Elvish (.elv extension, rc integration)

These tests ensure the completion installation system handles all supported
shells correctly and that derived trait implementations work as expected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
